meta.title: The incredible stealth tech behind tinted cockpit canopies
meta.description:
Have you ever noticed how the canopy of stealth fighters have an unusual tint to them, like these shots of F-22s with a gold hue or these of F-35s with different purple and blue hues shining through the canopy glass? 

Believe it or not, it’s actually an important part of the aircraft’s stealth profile.
